penalties.description: Minor deviation from marks estimated at less than 1mm total

knot_assessments.notes: Clean double throw formation, appropriate tension
Proper hand alternation demonstrated, secure throw
Final throw secure, knot appears stable

confidence_rationale: Clear visualization of all major task components including knot formation, hand switching, and suture placement. Minor uncertainty in exact deviation measurements due to camera angle.
cannot_determine: Exact millimeter measurements of suture deviation - estimated based on visual proximity to marks
technique_summary: Expert-level performance demonstrating excellent knot tying technique with proper hand alternation, clean suture placement, and efficient completion time of 95 seconds.
strengths: Smooth hand switching between all three throws
Clean needle loading and suture placement technique
improvement_suggestions: Minimal areas for improvement - performance already at expert level
Could potentially reduce first throw formation time by 5-10 seconds
